{% extends "layouts/main-external.html" %} {% set activeNavigation = "Add licences or give access" %} {% set licence = data['licences'][data.ID] %} {% set pageName="Enter your security code" %} {% block containerStart %} {{ govukBackLink({ text: "Back", href: "/external/manage-licences" }) }} {% endblock %} {% block content %}
{{ govukInput({ id: "securityCode", name: "securityCode", label: { text: pageName, isPageHeading: true, classes: "govuk-label--l" }, hint: { text: "We sent this by post to the registered address" }, classes: "govuk-input--width-10", value: data.securityCode if data.securityCode else "" }) }} {{ govukButton({ text: "Continue", type: "submit" }) }} {{ govukDetails({ summaryText: "Not received your code?", html: "We will send a security code to you straight away, using first-class mail.
If it has not arrived after that time, contact us to request a new code.
Email: enquiries@environment-agency.gov.uk
Telephone: 03708 506 506
Telephone from outside the UK: +44 114 282 5312
You can call us from 8am to 6pm, Monday to Friday." }) }}
{% endblock %}
